Descriptions.Description: Slammer Kit - Front - Lowers 2.00" - '89 - '99
Complete lowering kit in one box
Easy-to-install fork springs
Do not require complete disassembly of forks
Lowers the front of the bike up to 2”
Fork Lowering Kit - 49 mm - Lowers 1.00"
This is how you get the look many people want
Lowers forks up to 2"
Comes with two rebound springs and two 30.5 mm o.d. progressively wound fork springs plus instructions
Fork Lowering Kit - 49 mm - Lowers 2.00"
This is how you get the look many people want
Lowers forks up to 2"
Comes with two rebound springs and two 30.5 mm o.d. progressively wound fork springs plus instructions
Slammer Fork Kit - Lowers 2.00"
Designed to give you a lowered front end and superior ride performance
Experience a reduced front end "dive" during braking giving you more control and confidence while riding
High tensile SiCr (Silicon Chrome) Wire
Progressively Wound
Precision Ground
Available for both conventional and inverted forks
Kits include components to drop forks either 1" or 2"
Slammer Fork Kit includes all parts necessary to lower the front of the motorcycle. Side stand modification may be needed. Cut the included spacer to the length indicated, if necessary.
Crash Sliders - Black - Honda - CMX
Ride rebellious while protecting your bike
Each slider is made from durable Derlin that is shatterproof and allows the bike to slide rather than digging in and flipping while also protecting the bike from road rash
Front sliders mount through the front chassis while the rears mount to the upper shock mount
Direct, bolt-on design for easy installation
Hardware included
Side Covers - Slash Cut - Black - Honda - CMX
Features slash-cut windows and replaces with stock right and left side covers
Hardware included for simple bolt-on installation
Fork Preload Adjuster - 49 mm - Black
High performance suspension preload adjuster
Easily tune your front suspension to suit your weight and riding style
Simple installation with 20 mm of adjustment range via hex key
Fork Preload Adjuster - 39 mm - Machined Aluminum
High performance suspension preload adjuster
Easily tune your front suspension to suit your weight and riding style
Simple installation with 20 mm of adjustment range via hex key
Fork Preload Adjuster - 49 mm - Machined Aluminum
High performance suspension preload adjuster
Easily tune your front suspension to suit your weight and riding style
Simple installation with 20 mm of adjustment range via hex key
Fork Preload Adjuster - 39 mm - Black
High performance suspension preload adjuster
Easily tune your front suspension to suit your weight and riding style
Simple installation with 20 mm of adjustment range via hex key
Complete Black Vinyl Handlebar Cable/Line Kit for Ape Hangers - 14" - '06 FXD
Complete installation kit for Burly Ape hangers
Kit includes extended brake line (unless noted), extended clutch cable/clutch line, extended throttle/idle cables as required and all necessary wiring
Brake lines, when included, feature PTFE inner liner and heavy-duty stainless steel outer braid
Dresser kits reuse stock Throttle-By-Wire harness
Kit is based on using 2" risers with ape hanger-style handlebars.

Touring Model Control Kit - Gorilla Ape Hanger - 16" - Black

Intended for use with standard 2" risers.
Some ABS models use stock brake line.

Designed to grind down during impacts to prevent bike from catching and flipping
Functions as a highway bar for a secure grip and comfortable footrest on long rides
Durable materials ensure strong defense against damage during stunts or everyday use. Safeguards your investment and reduces potential repair costs
Balances performance with style, suited for both aggressive riding and extended journey
Front and rear kits sold separately
Hardware - Brawler ST-Style Saddle Bag - HD Softail
Designed for seamless integration of the Brawler Kit when using ST-style bags
Ensures optimal fitment
provides a smooth and hassle-free installation
Brawler Kit - Black - HD Dyna
Designed to work with Mid-control models only
TIG welded for max durability
Kit ncludes front Brawler and Rear sliders
Hardware included
Will not work with forward controls.
Will not fit with front spoilers.
Brawler Kit - Black - HD Sportster
Designed to work with Mid-controls only
Defends the bike in the event of a wipeout
TIG welded for max durability
Kit includes the front crash guard and rear sliders
Hardware included
Will not work with forward controls.
Exhaust systems that extend beyond the front frame down tubes by more than 1/2" may interfere with the installation of the crash bar.
Will not fit with front spoilers.
For models equipped with ABS, the ABS brake hoses located in front of the engine may need to be manipulated or re-routed to install the front crash bar.
Installation of the rear crash bar on XL1200T Superlow requires removal of the saddlebag.

Welded and mandrel bent for precision fit

Dimpled/Dented for control mounting

Dominator Handlebar - Raked - 10" - Black
Delivers a responsive handling position without sacrificing comfort or looks
The tube diameter is 1-1/4” stepped down to 1” for use with stock hand controls
Laser cut, welded, deburred, and slotted for easy internal wiring
The bars are crowned for electronic fly-by-wire throttle applications and polished to a show quality finish
Some bars require longer cables/lines/electrical for installation and will not fit models with integrated lower clamp

Slammer Shock - 12.2"
Crafted with a high-pressure nitrogen charged damper
Utilizes a hard chrome precision ground piston rod and features a steel monotube construction with an Internal Floating Piston (IFP) to provide incredible ride performance, even at increased speeds
Deflective disc valving
Preload adjustment via threaded preload adjuster with included preload spanner wrench
Made in the USA
M8 Softail "Slammer Shock" lowers the rear of the Motorcycle. Side stand modification may be needed.
Stiletto Shock - 13" - Black
High-performance damper with dual springs
Main spring coil absorbs big hits and prevents bottoming, while the secondary coil smooths out minor road imperfections
Provide a plush ride that's not afraid to play rough
May require modification to exhaust brackets to open up clearance for belt
Made in the USA

Before purchasing or installing shocks that are different than OEM length, confirm that wheel travel can be altered without causing clearance issues, such as swingarm/axle to exhaust contact and chain/belt guard or tire contact.
